title: tanacetum trichophyllum
intro: Tanacetum trichophyllum, also known as the white pyrethrum or white daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It is widely used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum trichophyllum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
